y_star: 每个 scenario 的 workspace fixture 加 git init 且 trial loop 调 git reset --hard
actions_taken: git_init_baseline(workspace_dir) writes baseline commit before any trial
git_reset_workspace(workspace_dir) runs git reset --hard HEAD + git clean -fdq before each trial in run_scenario_all_arms
smoke test confirmed: dirty arith.py and add untracked noise.txt → after git_reset_workspace, arith.py restored to baseline content (safe_divide present) and noise.txt deleted
